scripts.test:smoke: bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/auth.spec.ts tests/dashboard.spec.ts tests/alerts.spec.ts tests/cases.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/global-search.spec.ts tests/mappings.spec.ts tests/player-lists.spec.ts tests/ingest-jobs.spec.ts tests/ingest-errors.spec.ts tests/feature-store.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/model-registry.spec.ts tests/audit-logs.spec.ts tests/reports.spec.ts tests/notifications.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/admin-settings.spec.ts tests/admin-ops.spec.ts tests/api-keys.spec.ts
scripts.test:compliance: bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/players-compliance.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/coaf-protocol.spec.ts
scripts.test:extended: bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/mappings-versioning.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/ingest-operations.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/ingest-rate-limit.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/ingest-connectors.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/ingest-tenant-isolation.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/fictibet-dataset-pack.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/report-exports.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/maintenance-mode.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/report-audit.spec.ts && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/onboarding.spec.ts
scripts.test:security: bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/security-rbac.spec.ts -g "analyst sees full CPF" && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/security-rbac.spec.ts -g "auditor cannot mutate alert labels" && bash scripts/run-playwright.sh tests/security-rbac.spec.ts -g "auditor can access audit logs"
scripts.test:nightly: npm run test:smoke && npm run test:extended && npm run test:security && npm run test:compliance
